title: Create: Recipes+
description: A Mod Adding Pretty Much Essential Recipes To Create Forge 1.20.1! Not-Guaranteed to be maintained often.
body:
# Additions
This mod adds recipes essential to progression and also introduces the MECHANICAL DRYER.

## Create Recipes+
Create Recipes+ expands the Create mod with additional crafting options for early-game and automation. It includes recipes for kelp, dried kelp, and other basic items that are normally tedious to acquire, making them accessible through mechanical processes. These additions are designed to integrate smoothly with Create's contraptions and crafting flow.

# The Mechanical Dryer
The mechanical dryer is used to dry items and also emits redstone if you want it to.

## Mod:

# Q&A
## What version is best to use the dryer?
Answer: 0.6.1D
## What Version is best for devs?
Answer: 0.6.1(any of the letterlabled versions through A-C)-Dev(any of the letterlabled versions through A-C)
